welcome.title: Welcome to MicroCred!
welcome.description: A quick tour of the key parts of the platform. You can skip it and re-launch it later from the Manual page.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Overview of your credentials, applications and notifications.

metrics.title: Your key metrics
metrics.description: Active credentials, pending applications and credentials expiring soon.

myCredentials.title: My Credentials
myCredentials.description: All of your issued credentials — details, blockchain proof and sharing options.

applications.title: Applications
applications.description: Track application status (In review, Evidence collected, Verified, Issued, Rejected).

apply.title: Apply for Credential
apply.description: Browse available micro-credential templates and submit an application.

profile.title: Public Profile
profile.description: Your public profile that you can share with employers and institutions.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Updates on status changes, expirations and newly issued credentials.

manual.title: Manual
manual.description: Detailed guidance for every part of the platform — always available here.

done.title: You're all set!
done.description: Good luck collecting your credentials. You can re-launch this tour anytime from the Manual page.

welcome.title: Welcome to MicroCred for institutions!
welcome.description: A quick tour of the key parts of the platform. You can skip it and re-launch it later from the Manual page.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Institution dashboard with KPIs, pending actions, blockchain status and recent activity.

metrics.title: Key metrics
metrics.description: Published micro-credentials, total issued, active learners and staff, pending actions and blockchain confirmation rate.

templatesAdmin.title: Micro-credentials
templatesAdmin.description: Catalog of all micro-credential templates for your institution — create, edit and publish.

templatesStaff.title: My Micro-credentials
templatesStaff.description: Micro-credential templates you are assigned to as staff.

templateNew.title: Create Micro-credential
templateNew.description: Define a new template — learning outcomes, level, evidence requirements, supervisors and quality-assurance documents.

staff.title: Staff
staff.description: Manage staff members and assign them to specific micro-credentials they can issue.

earners.title: Earners
earners.description: Directory of learners who have applied for or received credentials from your institution.

requests.title: Issuance Requests
requests.description: Incoming applications from earners. Review evidence, request changes, verify and issue.

issue.title: Direct Issuance
issue.description: Issue a credential to a single earner without an application — useful for invited recipients.

bulk.title: Bulk Issuance
bulk.description: Upload a CSV to issue the same micro-credential to many earners at once.

credentials.title: Issued Credentials
credentials.description: All credentials your institution has issued, with search, filters and blockchain status.

revocations.title: Revocations
revocations.description: Revoke previously issued credentials with a reason — the revocation is anchored on chain.

anchoring.title: Blockchain Queue
anchoring.description: Anchoring status for issued credentials: pending, submitted, confirmed or failed. Retry failed anchors here.

profile.title: Public Profile
profile.description: Public page of your institution that learners and employers can visit to verify credentials.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Updates on new applications, evidence submissions, anchoring failures and other events.

manual.title: Manual
manual.description: Detailed guidance for every part of the platform — always available here.

done.title: You're all set!
done.description: You can re-launch this tour anytime from the Manual page.

intro.title: Issued Credentials
intro.description: All credentials your institution has issued. This quick tour highlights the actions you can take from this page.

filters.title: Search & filters
filters.description: Search by earner, title or credential ID, and narrow the list by micro-credential template or lifecycle status (issued, pending acceptance, rejected, revoked, expired, superseded, draft).

lifecycle.title: Lifecycle
lifecycle.description: Shows the current state of each credential. Rejected credentials also display the earner's reason underneath.

blockchain.title: Blockchain status
blockchain.description: Anchoring status of the credential on the blockchain: pending, submitted, confirmed or failed.

actions.title: Available actions
actions.description:
Per-row actions depend on the lifecycle:
Edit & resend — for rejected credentials: update grade and/or expiry, then resend to the earner for acceptance.
Accept rejection — permanently delete a rejected credential.
Renew expiry — for issued or expired credentials with an expiry date: walk through review, evidence and verification, then issue a new expiry on chain (no earner acceptance needed).

done.title: You're all set!
done.description: You can re-launch this tour anytime from the Manual page.
